title: BEM-874 route decision
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/roadmap']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:50 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem873_verify_bem871_decision.json')
decision=prev.get('decision','UNKNOWN')
if decision=='APPROVED':
    marker=Path('governance/roadmap/BEM874_PROTOCOL_APPROVED_RESUME.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-874 | Protocol Approved — Resume Roadmap'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+'Protocol: governance/protocols/BEM870_ITERATIVE_PATCHED_PROTOCOL.md'+sep+'Source: governance/state/bem873_verify_bem871_decision.json'+sep)
    status='protocol_approved_resume_marker_created'
    next_action='resume roadmap implementation under approved protocol'
    created_files=[str(marker)]
elif decision in ['CHANGE_REQUIRED','BLOCKED']:
    marker=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem874_protocol_still_needs_changes.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-874 | Protocol Still Needs Changes'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: extract concrete patchable changes from BEM873 response and patch again.'+sep)
    status='protocol_still_needs_changes'
    next_action='extract concrete patchable changes from BEM873 response and patch again'
    created_files=[str(marker)]
else:
    status='approval_response_missing_or_unknown'
    next_action='repair Claude decision response dispatch/filter'
    created_files=[]
state={'bem':'BEM-874','status':status,'decision':decision,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem874_route_after_bem873_decision.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem874_route_after_bem873_decision.md').write_text('# BEM-874 | Route After BEM-873 Decision | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem874_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-874'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem874_route_after_bem873_decision.json','governance/reports/bem874_route_after_bem873_decision.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem874_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-873 Claude decision for iterative patched protocol')
"""
No issue comments.
